chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 906 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3283/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.3284/2022 (Ex./A) 4. For orders on CMA No.3285/2022 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 20-07-2022 Mr. Shoaib Niaz Khaskheli, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2 to 5. Counsel for the petitioner submits that the Election Commission of Pakistan, vide Notification No. F.20/2022-Law dated 14th July, 2022, has notified the Election Tribunals for trial and disposal of the election petitions pertaining to the 1st phase of Local Government Elections, 2022 held on 26th June, 2022. In the view of above, Counsel for the petitioner does not press the present petition and states that the petitioner would approach the concerned Election Tribunal for seeking the relief admissible to him under the law. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
